vllm.title: [Bugfix] Validate SamplingParam n is an int
vllm.author: saumya-saran
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, malicious requests can cause the AsyncLLMEngine to be in an errored state simply by sending SamplingParam(n=1.0). The error thrown can be somewhat cryptic and difficult to trace without knowing internal details.
To reproduce:
from vllm import AsyncLLMEngine, AsyncEngineArgs, SamplingParam

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Core] Fix tekken edge case for mistral tokenizer
vllm.author: patrickvonplaten
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix leading non-utf unicode tokens for tekken
FIX #8627
Generally, decoding id by id is dangerous for unicode tokenizers such as tekken (see: openai/tiktoken#202 (comment))
This PR makes sure that invalid tokens are instead passed as valid unicode code bytes and then later correctly decoded

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix incorrect llava next feature size calculation
vllm.author: zyddnys
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The old code produces incorrect feature size and leads to
Attempted to assign XXX = XXX multimodal tokens to YYY placeholders

An image with size 700x840 can trigger this
FIX #8421

vllm.title: [Core] Rename `PromptInputs` to `PromptType`, and `inputs` to `prompt`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: These changes are split out from #6869. The reason for renaming this is to avoid confusing PromptInputs with LLMInputs (which will later be renamed into TokenInputs and EmbedInputs, corresponding to TokenPrompt and EmbedPrompt respectively).

vllm.title: [Core] Factor out common code in `SequenceData` and `Sequence`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
These changes are split out from #6869:

Added new constructors SequenceData.from_counts and SequenceData.from_seqs to reduce repetition in the code.
Made Sequence.prompt and Sequence.prompt_token_ids cached properties so that there is no need to explicitly define internal variables for storing the

vllm.title: [Kernel] Build flash-attn from source
vllm.author: ProExpertProg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR resolves #8002 and builds vllm-flash-attn from source. This is required for using torch nightly.
This PR relies on the new CMake-based build system in vllm-flash-attn.
To make installation smoother, this process uses an additional CMake install step for putting the .so targets in the correct

vllm.title: [VLM] Use `SequenceData.from_token_counts` to create dummy data
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR includes the following changes

Update VLMs to use the new SequenceData.from_counts or SequenceData.from_seqs constructors to avoid code repetition (split out from #6869)
Rename from_counts to from_token_counts and accept an arg list of tuples instead of a dictionary (in case some items have
